entity.summary: Seychelles-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange operating since 2018 and offering spot and derivatives markets through its active global platform.
entity.notes: Official company material and an independent exchange profile support the 2018 operating year and continuing service.

expected.summary: Seychelles-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the MEXC brand.
expected.notes: Official MEXC materials state that the exchange has operated since 2018.

changes.summary: Seychelles-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange operating since 2018 and offering spot and derivatives markets through its active global platform.
changes.notes: Official company material and an independent exchange profile support the 2018 operating year and continuing service.

events.title: MEXC began operating
events.description: MEXC began operating as a centralized cryptocurrency exchange in 2018.
events.notes: Year-level launch marker because the official company page states the operating year without an exact public day.

events.title: Hong Kong's SFC warned against unlicensed MEXC activity
events.description: Hong Kong's Securities and Futures Commission warned that MEXC was actively promoting virtual-asset trading services to Hong Kong investors without a licence application and added it to the Suspicious Virtual Asset Trading Platforms Alert List.
events.notes: The warning was jurisdiction-specific and did not establish a global shutdown or alter MEXC's active entity status.

evidence.title: About MEXC
evidence.notes: Official company page stating that MEXC has operated since 2018.

evidence.title: MEXC official exchange
evidence.notes: Current official exchange interface corroborating continuing operation.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for MEXC
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the MEXC identity, Seychelles registration, and 2018 establishment year.

evidence.title: SFC warns public against unlicensed virtual asset trading platform MEXC
evidence.publisher: Securities and Futures Commission of Hong Kong
evidence.notes: Primary regulator announcement states that MEXC was unlicensed, had not applied for a VATP licence, and was added to the alert list.

evidence.title: MEXC alert-list entry
evidence.publisher: Securities and Futures Commission of Hong Kong
evidence.notes: The regulator's alert-list entry records MEXC and the March 15, 2024 addition date.
